sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n96319" key="stafuliokau/sths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στᾰφῠλιοκαύστης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n96319.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">instrument for cauterizing the uvula</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.31</biblScope> </bibl> (<xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σταφυλο-</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
